title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: A multi-agent system design approach that uses deterministic code and callbacks to skip unnecessary LLM invocations at scale. The Race Condition system demonstrates running 1,000 agents on autopilot with zero LLM calls by using the Spine and Sprout algorithm for route planning instead of querying an LLM.
